mapper.select: select m.id, m.campus_id campusId, c.name campusName, c.status campusStatus, m.merchant_code merchantCode, m.name, m.logo, m.cover_image coverImage, m.description, m.announcement, m.contact_name contactName, m.contact_phone contactPhone, m.address_detail addressDetail, m.sort, m.status, m.business_status businessStatus, m.business_begin_time businessBeginTime, m.business_end_time businessEndTime, c.delivery_fee deliveryFee, c.estimated_delivery_minutes estimatedDeliveryMinutes, c.service_phone servicePhone from merchant m join campus c on m.campus_id = c.id where m.id = #{merchantId}
